MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Manbujen Patel is present.
Attorney, Michael S. Rossoff, is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Flor De Chuc is present.
Attorney, Simon Lee is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 28, 2013 is vacated.
